sources.title: US Patent Office - Candidate Patent Filings

result.summary: The CTO candidate has a verified 15-year track record in infrastructure engineering, with prior VP Eng roles at two Series C+ startups and 3 granted patents in distributed systems, though one prior company exit was a distressed acquisition.
key_findings: Confirmed leadership of 120+ person engineering org at previous company with successful SOC 2 and ISO 27001 certifications
Published 8 technical blog posts and spoke at KubeCon and QCon, demonstrating strong technical credibility
One of three prior companies underwent a distressed acquisition at 0.4x invested capital, warranting further reference checks on leadership during downturn
